name: dialog
description: Modal dialog built on Base UI Dialog. Composable header, body, footer.

docs.usage:
// Trigger uses render prop — pass any element
<Dialog>
  <DialogTrigger render={<button>Open Dialog</button>} />
  <DialogContent>
    <DialogHeader>
      <DialogTitle>Are you sure?</DialogTitle>
      <DialogDescription>This action cannot be undone.</DialogDescription>
    </DialogHeader>
    <DialogFooter>
      <DialogClose render={<button>Cancel</button>} />
      <button>Delete</button>
    </DialogFooter>
  </DialogContent>
</Dialog>
